title: pyrus confusa
intro: Pyrus confusa, also known as the Chinese pear or mountain pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus confusa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and relieving digestive issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
